summary: Created routingAgent.ts extracting routing sub-agent from ridePlanningAgent.ts. The new module includes executeRoutingAgent (uses Haiku model, maxSteps:6, timeoutMs:90_000), buildRoutingPrompt (Phase 1 only, includes location block), executeRoutingTool dispatcher for 4 tools (geocode, createRouteSketch, compileSketch, planRoute), all PendingSketchState helpers moved from ridePlanningAgent.ts, runGeocode exported for reuse by searchAgent (US-078), and ExecuteContext forwarding for onToolStart/onToolFinish/onAgentTurn/onToolResultPiMessage only (not onTextDelta/onThinkingDelta). Sub-agent receives NO conversation history.
